summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Binani Enterprises iteration 2 features: Admin auth-protected area and Zoho Bookings toggle. All 26 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed including admin login flow, protected routes, KPI cards, search/status filters, status updates, logout, and booking page mode toggle.
seed_data_creation: Test bookings created with TEST_ prefix during backend testing (TEST_Admin Update, TEST_Admin Delete, TEST_Public Create)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 adds admin auth and Zoho toggle. Admin tests in /app/backend/tests/test_admin_api.py cover: login (success/wrong creds), /admin/me token validation, /admin/bookings CRUD with auth, /admin/stats. Frontend verified: ProtectedRoute redirects, login form validation, admin dashboard KPIs/search/filter/status update/logout, booking page mode toggle (form/zoho), SiteChrome hides navbar/footer on /admin/* paths. REACT_APP_ZOHO_BOOKING_URL is intentionally empty - shows setup instructions.

backend: Public endpoints still work (GET/POST /api/bookings, GET /api/stats, POST /api/contact) ✓
frontend: Admin login form - empty submission shows error toast ✓
Admin login form - wrong credentials shows 'Invalid email or password' toast ✓
Admin login form - correct credentials navigates to /admin/bookings ✓
Admin bookings page - KPI cards (Total leads, New, Contacted, Converted) ✓
Admin bookings page - search filter filters by name/email/phone ✓
Admin bookings page - status filter dropdown works ✓
Admin bookings page - status update via Select shows 'Status updated' toast ✓
Admin bookings page - logout clears session and redirects to /admin/login ✓
Booking page /book - mode toggle has 'Quick form' and 'Pick a slot' buttons ✓
Booking page - 'Pick a slot' shows Zoho setup instructions (REACT_APP_ZOHO_BOOKING_URL empty) ✓
Booking page - 'Use quick form for now' switches back to form mode ✓
SiteChrome - navbar/footer visible on public pages (/, /book) ✓
SiteChrome - navbar/footer hidden on admin pages (/admin/login, /admin/bookings) ✓
